name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence (Extreme)
hypothesis: The parent spec (iter018_bbo_divergence_tight) successfully improved WR to 91.6% by tightening its threshold to 1.5. This mutation continues that trend by tightening the threshold further to 1.8. By demanding an even greater divergence between BBO and deep book pressure, confirmed by trade flow, we aim to isolate an even higher-conviction subset of momentum signals, potentially increasing WR and expectancy.
mutation_note: Tightened the divergence threshold from 1.5 to 1.8 based on successful feedback from the parent spec.
